title: Pleurothallis sylvatica
taxonomy: Pleurothallis sylvatica is classified as a species within the genus Pleurothallis, which is a part of the orchid family (Orchidaceae) and the order Asparagales. The genus Pleurothallis is a group of epiphytic orchids, primarily found in Central and South America. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics, such as its growth habit, leaf structure, and flower shape. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, containing over 30,000 known species. As a member of this family, Pleurothallis sylvatica shares many characteristics with other orchids, but also exhibits unique traits that distinguish it from its relatives.
